This PR formalizes the Tech Debt Radar, systematically mapping and targeting architectural debt using frontier-model-driven semantic RAG sweeps across historical issues and Agent OS memory sessions. It also updates the ticket intake and PR review gates to mandate 'Semantic Blast-Radius Sweeps' prior to architectural changes, protecting against unknown unknowns. Resolves #10023
